top_sources.top_context: rn food into energy. When they’re running slow and inefficient, you feel tired, foggy, and “off.” GLP-1s help by improving blood sugar and lowering inflammation, but to _thrive_ in your new body, you need to rebuild those mitochondria. This includes compounds such as **BAM15, SLU-PP-332, Urolithin A, L-carnitine, SS-31, and MOTS-c**. Start with the basics: sunshine, regular physical activity, cold exposure, and quality sleep. If you want to get fancy, mitochondrial support supplements or peptides can help. Your mitochondria dictate how well you burn fat, build muscle, and fight agi
